candidates.why: This is the only explicit operating D&A row tied to the selected COGS bucket 'Production costs'. It appears as a separate line item alongside the production-cost rows rather than as a nested subcomponent of the selected row, so it should be added separately later.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Intangibles Selling and administrative expenses
candidates.why: This D&A row belongs to SG&A, not to the selected COGS bucket 'Production costs', so it should not be used for COGS_DA.

variables.notes: Selected the separate production-related amortization row because the chosen parent COGS row is 'Production costs' and the amortization appears disclosed separately at the same operating level; using the separate D&A row avoids assuming it is embedded.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Intangibles Selling and administrative expenses
candidates.why: This is the explicit operating D&A row tied to the selected XSGA bucket 'Selling and administrative expenses'. It is shown separately from the selected SG&A row, so it should be added separately later.
This D&A row belongs to production/COGS, not SG&A, so it should not be used for XSGA_DA.

final_choice.row_label: Amortization of Intangibles Selling and administrative expenses

variables.notes: No separate R&D expense row is selected or visible above EBIT, and the explicit SG&A-related amortization row appears separate from the selected SG&A row, so it should be added separately to XSGA.
